{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220839E945EB316201A5D9F84F"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529574546482529048","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得很不错，没什么流水账的，毕竟赛博朋克2077这个游戏本身它就是一个任务接着一个任务，很多个任务连在一起的，而且你第1次写书写到这种程度已经很棒了，写的确实是不错，虽然各方面有待提升，但是你第1次写书已经写得非常好，而且西红柿上面写赛博朋克并且穿越成V的不是很多，你这写的确实是不错，坚持写下去，很好看。","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":16,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774102119A5D9F84F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227529574546482529048%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227515818015691115582%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753132141,"group_id":"7515818015691115582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3cPgBt2P8G0y7cyK9HkOS1wewMss2kZhqwqTT9hxyYq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"1354223796355179","user_name":"亚空间五神的共选者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1354223796355179","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"75 可他只不过是V传奇之路的见证者，他不能干预V和大卫的结局。
